title: Hybridization and Immobilization
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"9ftkl","text":"This protocol is to assemble GotCha with circular probe, immobilization probe and magnetic beads.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Add 9 µL of 10X pH 7.4 PBS buffer
Heated to 90 °C for 00:00:30 then cool down to Room temperature and keep for 00:30:00
Take 22.5 µL of 10mg/ml magnetic beads into a eppendorf
Vortex then spin down in Centrifuge 15000 rpm, °C, 2 minutes
Carefully take the eppendorf onto the DynaMag and wait for 00:01:00 to collect the beads
Wash beads with 1X PBS for three times. Make sure that eppendorf should put on DynaMag when removing supernatant.
Add 90 µL of hybridization solution into the eppendorf with dry beads
Incubate at Room temperature for 00:30:00 , then spindown in Centrifuge 15000 rpm, °C, 2 minutes
Carefully take the eppendorf onto the DynaMag and wait for 00:01:00 to collect the beads
Wash beads with 1X PBS for three times. Make sure that eppendorf should put on DynaMag when removing supernatant.
Preserve the functional beads in 90 µL 1X PBS
creator: Chia-Hsien Shih
